def positive_handler_or_view_owns_transaction_lifecycle():
    rule_id = "handler_or_view_owns_transaction_lifecycle"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Route handler or view manually manages database transaction boundaries (begin/commit/rollback)."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
